Hero.impactTitle: A designer who can think strategically and polish details.

Footer.title: Have a product idea, redesign, or growth challenge worth solving?
Footer.description: I help teams turn complex requirements into polished product experiences that feel clear, premium, and easy to use.
Footer.designBy: Designed & Built by Ahmed Essam Maher

HomePage.featuredProjectsTitle: Case studies that show product thinking, not just visuals.
HomePage.featuredProjectsSub: A curated selection of portfolio work focused on usability, product clarity, and premium interface execution.
HomePage.projectImpactFallback: Sharper UX structure and a more confident digital product direction.
HomePage.projectDescriptionFallbackEn: A premium product design case study focused on usability, hierarchy, and product storytelling.
HomePage.projectDescriptionFallbackAr: A premium product design case study focused on usability, hierarchy, and product storytelling.
HomePage.sampleProjectDescription1: Reshaped the landing experience to communicate value faster, reduce friction, and guide visitors to the right action.
HomePage.sampleProjectImpact1: Clearer hierarchy, stronger trust cues, and more focused conversion paths.
HomePage.sampleProjectDescription2: Built a modular showcase framework that turns scattered content into an engaging, high-credibility portfolio narrative.
HomePage.sampleProjectImpact2: A more scalable content system with stronger storytelling across screens.
HomePage.aboutTitle: Designing digital products with structure, empathy, and visual confidence.
HomePage.aboutSubtitle: I work at the intersection of UX strategy, interface design, and product storytelling to make digital experiences clearer and more valuable.
HomePage.aboutStatValue2: Interfaces that feel premium and usable
HomePage.principle1: I begin by understanding the problem deeply before shaping interface direction.
HomePage.principle2: I use systems thinking so product decisions scale beyond a single screen.
HomePage.principle3: I care about the details that make products feel trusted, smooth, and memorable.
HomePage.skillsTitle: A focused set of capabilities for better digital products.
HomePage.skillsSubtitle: The homepage stays concise, while deeper service details live inside the dedicated pages and case studies.
HomePage.serviceDesc1: Clarifying the right product direction, priorities, and user-centered decisions before pixels move.
HomePage.serviceDesc2: Designing flows and interfaces that feel intuitive, polished, and aligned with business goals.
HomePage.serviceDesc3: Creating scalable component systems and patterns that keep digital products consistent over time.
HomePage.contactTitle: Need a designer who can think in systems and craft premium interfaces?
HomePage.contactSubtitle: Let's talk about redesigns, new digital products, or product design support that helps your team move with more clarity.

AboutPage.title: A product designer focused on clarity, systems, and human-centered decisions.
AboutPage.subtitle: I design experiences that align user needs with product goals while keeping the final interface refined, structured, and easy to trust.
AboutPage.statValue2: Products that feel intentional and easier to use
AboutPage.principle1: I start from the problem, not the screen.
AboutPage.principle2: I use systems thinking to create scalable product decisions.
AboutPage.principle3: I refine details until the experience feels calm, clear, and credible.
AboutPage.bio1: I am Ahmed Essam Maher, a UI/UX and digital product designer who cares deeply about translating complexity into clarity.
AboutPage.bio2: My work combines research, business understanding, and interface craft to build digital products that feel more intuitive, polished, and purposeful.

ServicesPage.title: How I help founders and teams build stronger digital products.
ServicesPage.subtitle: I support product teams across strategy, UX, interface design, and system thinking to create experiences that feel premium and make sense fast.
ServicesPage.sideCopy: Each engagement is shaped around product goals, user friction, and the level of polish needed to ship with confidence.
ServicesPage.serviceDesc1: Clarifying product direction, priorities, and the UX opportunities worth solving first.
ServicesPage.serviceDesc2: Designing clear flows and elegant interfaces that help people move through products with less friction.
ServicesPage.serviceDesc3: Creating scalable libraries, patterns, and rules that keep teams fast and products consistent.
ServicesPage.processTitle: A simple process that keeps projects strategic and focused.
ServicesPage.processSubtitle: I work with clarity from the beginning: define the challenge, shape the product direction, and refine the final experience.
ServicesPage.step1: Understand the context, constraints, and user friction.
ServicesPage.step2: Translate findings into structure, flows, and interface direction.
ServicesPage.step3: Polish, validate, and hand off a system that supports scale.

ContactPage.title: Let's talk about the next product experience you want to elevate.
ContactPage.subtitle: If you're planning a redesign, launching something new, or want sharper UX direction, I'd be glad to hear about it.
